## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss GrowthX's content production process and results for Diligent](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX demonstrated their AI-powered content creation pipeline, explaining how human oversight is maintained throughout](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Content refreshes are showing strong positive results, with increased sessions and engagement rates](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [LLM traffic (e.g. ChatGPT) is being tracked, providing insights into which pages are most visible in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Recent algorithm updates seem to be filtering out spam for branded keywords, but overall impressions are up](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Process Overview

  - [GrowthX uses an AI pipeline with human oversight at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Process includes: assignment brief, research, outline, draft, fact-checking, and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Key artifacts (company context, personas, writing guidelines) inform the AI at various stages](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Human content managers shape and edit the AI output throughout](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### Content Performance Results

  - [Dashboard shows impressive session increases for refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Engagement rates have improved, indicating users spend more time on updated pages](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [LLM traffic report shows which pages are most visible in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [ChatGPT drives the most traffic, but other AI sources are also tracked](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

### Recent Algorithm Updates

  - [Recent spam update appears to be filtering out non-brand-related uses of "Diligent"](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Overall impressions are up, though clicks are slightly down due to seasonal factors](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Refreshed content continues to perform well despite algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)

### Content Requests and Workflow

  - [Kezia requested including brief/assignment info in Optimizely for context](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Discussion on how to incorporate SME quotes and custom content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [Balance needed between customization and maintaining publishing speed](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)

### Next Steps and Action Items

  - [Jo to break down "Considering" list into more granular topics for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Kezia to update status of content pieces from "Considering" to "Think" where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement SME quotes provided by Festus in upcoming refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Kezia to review shared report and provide any follow-up questions](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=2016.0)
  - [Kezia's team to finalize pending SEO reviews](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kezia to review performance report and provide any follow-up questions](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=2016.0)
  - [Kezia to approve more items on the content list for net new production next week](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
  - [Kezia's team to finalize pending SEO reviews](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [GrowthX to start mixing refreshes and net new content production from next week](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider future pipeline improvements for easier inclusion of custom quotes/content](https://fathom.video/share/EQpwzUoMvKrBuju26yzkzUi7CqJYoxM_?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
